subcodes.first_line: God willing, mayest thou ever remain, as thou hast ever been, triumphant through His gracious care, clinging fast to the hem of His loving-kindness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انشاء الله لم یزل و لایزال بعنایه الله فائز باشی و بذیل الطافش متشبث رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @The Primal Will; self-generation of the Primal Will
